title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.55.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | `v1.54.0` -> `v1.55.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.55.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.55.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.54.0/v1.55.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.54.0/v1.55.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage (github.com/containers/storage)</summary>

### [`v1.55.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.55.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.54.0...v1.55.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v1.54.0 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://togithub.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1925](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1925)
-   Fix assignment of quota IDs for XFS quotas by [@​mheon](https://togithub.com/mheon) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1921](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1921)
-   Fix locking bugs from [#​1916](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/issues/1916), and one more by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1927](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1927)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/burntsushi/toml to v1.4.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1930](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1930)
-   composefs: add parent directory if missing by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1929](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1929)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20240529 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1932](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1932)
-   overlay: remove unreachable code by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1934](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1934)
-   chunked: ignore the tar-split data if digest is empty by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1936](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1936)
-   chunked: change auto merge threshold to 1024 by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1937](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1937)
-   Trivial patches to minimize patches needed by NetBSD by [@​coypoop](https://togithub.com/coypoop) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1935](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1935)
-   archive: always fix mode for root dir with ForceMask by [@​akihikodaki](https://togithub.com/akihikodaki) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1931](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1931)
-   compression: Add some doc comments by [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1939](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1939)
-   chunked: fix deadlock by always consuming tar-split by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1942](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1942)
-   dump: replace unicode package with custom functions by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1940](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1940)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.21.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1946](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1946)
-   dump: use the sanitized path for root check by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1948](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1948)
-   chunked: Set O_CLOEXEC by [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1947](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1947)
-   graphdriver: Clarify name of fsverity const, tweak docs by [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1949](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1949)
-   dump: handle duplicates by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1951](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1951)
-   chunked: refactor file system ops in a new file and add some tests by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1952](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1952)
-   chunked: Add helpers for /proc/self/fd accesses by [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1956](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1956)
-   chunked: use Fprint instead of Fprintf by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1960](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1960)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.12.4 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1961](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1961)
-   Fix build failures by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1954](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1954)
-   chunked: improve error messages for file system operations by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1957](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1957)
-   compression: Fix Deprecated: and actually comment out unused bits by [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1958](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1958)
-   chunked: Fix two minor linter issues by [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1959](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1959)
-   overlay: extend overlayFileGetter to understand composefs by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1950](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1950)
-   pkg/archive.statDifferent(): care about mtime for directories by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1962](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1962)
-   chunked: add fuzzing tests for the cache by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1963](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1963)
-   overlay: Fix root directoy state with extended attributes by [@​akihikodaki](https://togithub.com/akihikodaki) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1953](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1953)
-   archive: use pigz|zstd if available by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1964](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1964)
-   chunked: use existing buffer for io.Copy by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1965](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1965)
-   chunked: honor store configuration by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1966](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1966)
-   pkg/archive.statDifferent(): fix the previous change by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1968](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1968)
-   Decide on tar-split usage based on trusted data in TOC by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1967](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1967)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.17.9 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1969](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1969)
-   Fix warnings (SA9003, SA4023, SA1019) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1973](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1973)
-   Fix deprecated use of `pwalk.Walk` (SA1019) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1975](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1975)
-   Fix deprecated use of `  io/ioutil ` (SA1019) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1977](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1977)
-   chunked: honor the ForceMask setting by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1971](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1971)
-   overlay: drop check for mount_program AND force_mask by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1970](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1970)
-   Fix deprecated use of `mountinfo.PidMountInfo` (SA1019) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1981](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1981)
-   Fix deprecated use of `capability.NewPid` (SA1019) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1979](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1979)
-   Fix deprecated use of `tar.TypeRegA` (SA1019) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1980](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1980)
-   overlay: check for options != nil by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1984](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1984)
-   Fix the issue where compiling containers-storage with exclude_disk_qu… by [@​xuegege5290](https://togithub.com/xuegege5290) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1982](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1982)
-   store: drop remap-\[ug]ids by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1976](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1976)
-   Fix the surrounding loop is unconditionally terminated (SA4004) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1986](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1986)
-   vfs: honor the specified mappings by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1988](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1988)
-   Fix `TestSafeLink` on ARM64 by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1989](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1989)
-   Add comented out example definition of driver_priority to storage.conf by [@​dcermak](https://togithub.com/dcermak) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1987](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1987)
-   Fix deprecated use of `hdr.Xattrs` (SA1019) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1985](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1985)
-   chunked: skip setting time if empty by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1996](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1996)
-   Move `junkfile` to `${TESTDIR}` directory by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1995](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1995)
-   Enable `staticcheck` linter by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1991](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1991)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.22.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2000](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2000)
-   check: mount layer as read-only by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1997](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1997)
-   Solve `errcheck` warnings (part 2) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1999](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1999)
-   Solve `errcheck` warnings (part 4) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2003](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2003)
-   Solve `errcheck` warnings (part 5) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2006](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2006)
-   Solve `errcheck` warnings (part 0) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1993](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1993)
-   Solve `errcheck` warnings (part 1) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1998](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1998)
-   Solve `errcheck` warnings (part 3) by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2002](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2002)
-   chunked: store compressed digest if validated by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2001](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2001)
-   Don't discard fields of `LayerOptions` by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2008](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2008)
-   Clean up some warnings by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2010](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2010)
-   Enable `errcheck` linter by [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2011](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2011)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.3.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2013](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2013)
-   drivers: drop modprobe calls by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2021](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2021)
-   archive: report error from input stream by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2012](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2012)
-   archive: improve filter error reporting by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2025](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2025)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.12.5 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2029](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2029)
-   chunked, composefs: fix decoding of xattrs by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2037](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2037)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/sys/mountinfo to v0.7.2 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2034](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2034)
-   Ensure chunked TOC and tar-split metadata are consistent by [@​mtrmac](https://togithub.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2035](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2035)
-   chunked: do not write cache file to RO store by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2031](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2031)
-   overlay: use private merged directory for AIS by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2036](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2036)
-   loopback: fix race condition opening loopback device by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2039](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2039)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin to v0.3.1 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2040](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2040)
-   Add some error context in Changes codepaths by [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2043](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2043)
-   overlay: improve some composefs errors by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2044](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2044)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/moby/sys/user to v0.2.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2045](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/2045)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​coypoop](https://togithub.com/coypoop) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1935](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1935)
-   [@​akihikodaki](https://togithub.com/akihikodaki) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1931](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1931)
-   [@​cgwalters](https://togithub.com/cgwalters) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1939](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1939)
-   [@​Honny1](https://togithub.com/Honny1) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1973](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1973)
-   [@​xuegege5290](https://togithub.com/xuegege5290) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1982](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1982)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.54.0...v1.55.0

</details>

comments.body:
### ℹ Artifact update notice

##### File name: go.mod

In order to perform the update(s) described in the table above, Renovate ran the `go get` command, which resulted in the following additional change(s):


- 6 additional dependencies were updated


Details:


| **Package**                             | **Change**             |
| :-------------------------------------- | :--------------------- |
| `github.com/BurntSushi/toml`            | `v1.3.2` -> `v1.4.0`   |
| `github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim`          | `v0.12.3` -> `v0.12.5` |
| `github.com/cyphar/filepath-securejoin` | `v0.2.5` -> `v0.3.1`   |
| `github.com/klauspost/compress`         | `v1.17.8` -> `v1.17.9` |
| `github.com/moby/sys/mountinfo`         | `v0.7.1` -> `v0.7.2`   |
| `github.com/moby/sys/user`              | `v0.1.0` -> `v0.2.0`   |
